name: Mile High Blueberry Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Generously grease muffin pans or use paper liners.
3. In a large bowl, mix flour, sugar, baking powder, and baking soda. Cut in butter using a pastry blender or fork until the mixture resembles fine crumbs.
4. In a small bowl, stir yogurt until creamy. Blend in eggs and vanilla extract. Pour all at once into the flour mixture and stir until the flour mixture is moistened. Do not overstir.
5. Gently fold in blueberries.
6. Fill prepared muffin cups 2/3 full. If desired, sprinkle the tops of the muffins with a bit of additional sugar.
7. Bake for 15-20 minutes, or until golden brown.
8. Remove from pans immediately. Serve warm.
